# Security Checklist: Standardize POI categories across sources

**Purpose**: Validate governance enforcement, error isolation, and auditability.
**Created**: 2026-03-11
**Feature**: `specs/020-standardize-poi-categories/spec.md`

**Note**: This checklist is generated by the `/prompts:speckit.checklist` workflow.

## Data Safety

- [x] CHK-SEC-001 Conflicting mappings always block promotion.
- [x] CHK-SEC-002 Unmapped-threshold governance is enforced as configured.
- [x] CHK-SEC-003 Promotion is atomic to avoid partial standardized updates.

## Error Handling

- [x] CHK-SEC-004 Failures report actionable details without exposing sensitive data.
- [x] CHK-SEC-005 Promotion failures leave production standardized categories intact.

## Traceability

- [x] CHK-SEC-006 Run identifiers and taxonomy/mapping versions are recorded for audits.
